app.title: 套管示意图绘制器
ui.excel_help: 包含套管数据的多工作表 Excel
ui.reset_confirm_body: 此操作将清空当前全部数据并重新加载示例数据。是否继续？
ui.lock_aspect_ratio: 自动适配宽度（锁定比例）
ui.depth_label_offset: 深度标注 X 偏移：
ui.auto_generate_hint_default: 启用后，数据或样式变更会自动重新生成示意图。
ui.auto_generate_hint_on: 已启用自动更新，修改后示意图将自动刷新。
ui.auto_generate_hint_off: 启用自动更新以保持示意图与编辑内容同步。
ui.info.casing: 标签位置提示：使用 标签X位置 将标签左右移动（-1 到 1 之间按图宽百分比；较大数值按像素）。为密集管柱设置 标签深度 可固定深度；留空则自动放置。
ui.info.lines: 标签位置说明：正值 = 右侧。-1 到 1 之间为相对偏移（如 +0.9 接近右边距）。留空则自动放置。
ui.info.plugs: 水泥塞尺寸：手动宽度 留空将按中部深度的套管内径或裸眼自动匹配；水泥塞可使用纹理样式。
ui.info.fluids: 流体说明：使用 Placement 选择环空目标（A/B/C、生产环空、地层环空或 Behind: casing）。Manual OD 仅用于覆盖该环空的外径；未选择有效目标的行会被忽略。
ui.info.markers: 标记说明：符号会绑定到 目标模式 选定的套管。射孔绘制三角形；漏失绘制 X。
ui.info.equipment: Equipment: Set engineering state fields (actuation, integrity, seal overrides) to drive topology barrier behavior.
ui.info.surface_assembly: Surface assembly: Start from a standard production tree, then edit named equipment rows in engineering language.
ui.surface_assembly.empty.title: Start from a standard production tree
ui.surface_assembly.empty.body: Choose a familiar surface arrangement first, then edit the named equipment rows in engineering language.
ui.surface_assembly.empty.template_copy: Main bore, production wing, swab access, and annulus access are pre-arranged.
ui.surface_assembly.sections.main_bore_h: Primary bore flow through the tree body and master valves.
ui.surface_assembly.sections.production_: Branch equipment that sends production flow to the outlet.
ui.surface_assembly.sections.swab_helper: Vertical access branch used for swab operations and top access.
ui.surface_assembly.inspection.title: Compiled Inspection
ui.surface_assembly.inspection.body: Read-only view of the compiled channels and branch exits derived from the named surface equipment.
ui.info.surface_flow_paths: Surface flow paths: Define flow channels first, then add ordered surface components within the selected flow path for topology analysis.
ui.info.topology_sources: Manual source overrides: Add a source only when a real inflow origin is known but not represented elsewhere in the model. Resolved rows become the authoritative source set for that analysis run. Set the depth range and Source volume using canonical keys only: TUBING_INNER, ANNULUS_A..ANNULUS_F, FORMATION_ANNULUS.
ui.info.topology_breakouts: Crossflow paths: Define explicit cross-annulus path rows with From volume + To volume across a depth range. Use canonical annulus keys (ANNULUS_A/B/C/D etc.); tubing-boundary slot-shifts are represented by ANNULUS_A <-> ANNULUS_B.
ui.topology.open_hole_source_toggle: Treat open hole as inflow point (basic mode)
ui.topology.open_hole_source_toggle_help: Adds inflow seeds on open-hole intervals only when the public fallback mode is set to open-hole and resolved manual source overrides are not active.
ui.info.boxes: 标签与详情：使用 标签X位置 进行手动偏移（-1 到 1 为图宽百分比；更大数值为像素）。在 备注 中填写长注释，并可按每个框切换可见性。
ui.surface_flow_paths.flow_paths_helper: Create one flow path per surface-accessible tubing bore or annulus channel.
ui.surface_flow_paths.components_helper: Add the ordered valves, interfaces, outlets, and side ports for the selected flow path.
ui.surface_flow_paths.select_path_hint: Select or create a flow path to edit its components.
ui.plot_note: 悬停或轻触区段查看参数，单击锁定高亮，或使用表格行聚焦图形。
ui.report.title: 工程评审报告
ui.report.summary.title: 摘要
ui.report.summary.author: 作者
ui.report.schematic.title: 示意图
ui.report.topology.title: 拓扑摘要
ui.report.topology.graph.empty: 此次导出没有可用的拓扑图数据。
ui.report.topology.error: 此次导出无法计算拓扑结果。
ui.review_summary.title: 审阅摘要

alert.excel_error: 读取 Excel 文件出错：
alert.export_excel: 已导出编辑后的数据到 Excel。
alert.import_lines: 已导入 {count} 条参考层位。
alert.import_boxes: 已导入 {count} 个区间标注。
alert.import_fluids: 已导入 {count} 个环空流体。
alert.fluids_migrated: 检测到旧版流体字段，已迁移为显式边界。
log.loaded: 套管示意图绘制器已加载。
ui.workflow_title: 数据 → 井眼轨迹 → 流体 → 显示 → 结果
ui.data_management_helper: 先加载项目基线数据，然后在下一节细化假设。
ui.view_options_helper: 在渲染前定义单位、投影模式和定向井假设。
ui.well_view_mode_hint: 直井请选择垂直模式，轨迹井请选择定向模式。
ui.annotation_tool.label: 标注工具：
ui.annotation_tool.hint: 选择以编辑已有标注，或切换到新增标注后在画布上放置新注释。
ui.annotation_tool.directional_note: 当前仅在垂直视图模式下支持标注编辑。
ui.x_exaggeration_hint: 用于控制定向井模式下水平展开程度的灵敏度。
ui.directional_viewport_fit_hint: Choose whether directional view keeps full graph visibility or prioritizes full-width usage.
ui.directional_label_scale_hint: 全局调整定向叠加标签的可读性倍率，导出时会使用相同的缩放字体。
ui.vertical_label_scale_hint: 全局调整垂直视图标签的可读性倍率，导出时会使用相同的缩放字体。
ui.interval_callout_standoff_hint: 全局控制区间标注框与井筒锚点之间的距离，适用于直井和定向井视图。
ui.directional_casing_arrow_mode_hint: Switch between directional-locked arrows and direct box-to-anchor arrows for dense sections.
ui.fluid_controls_helper: 在不改变计算结果的前提下，调整环空解释方式与水泥显示。
ui.annulus_mode_hint: 物理模式按几何关系推导环空；直接模式使用表格中的显式数值。
ui.plot_settings_helper: 仅影响显示效果的参数，用于提升标注清晰度与视图可读性。
ui.fluid_model_helper: 物理模式用于按几何关系自动计算环空层；直接模式严格使用表格中的显式数值。
ui.display_controls_helper: 用于控制渲染样式、配色方案以及可选显示图层。
ui.visual_inspector.title: 视觉属性检查器
ui.visual_inspector.helper: Edit selected properties for the currently selected schematic element.
ui.visual_inspector.empty: 请先在画布上锁定一个可视元素，然后再编辑其样式。
ui.visual_inspector.no_fields: 该元素当前没有可编辑的视觉属性。
ui.compare.preview_hint: 启用后显示旧版/声明式对比控件。
ui.analysis.title: Topology and Barrier Analysis
ui.analysis.description: Review flow connectivity, barrier robustness, and warnings on the same synchronized schematic.
ui.settings.title: 应用偏好
ui.settings.description: 更新适用于设计、分析及后续工作区的偏好设置。
ui.theme_mode_hint: System follows your OS preference. Changes apply immediately.

ui.project_new_confirm_body: This will discard the current project and start a new blank project with one empty well. Continue?
ui.import_scope.title: Import Destination
ui.import_scope.label: Apply import to:
ui.export_active_well_project: Export Active Well as Project JSON
ui.project_load_replace_confirm_body: This will replace the current project in memory. Continue?
alert.export_active_well_project: Exported active well as a project JSON file.
ui.project_metadata_export_hint: Heads up: well name, project name, and author name are exported to project JSON.
ui.analysis.topology.title: Topology MVP
ui.analysis.topology.diagnostics.title: Advanced diagnostics (debug)
ui.analysis.topology.notes.title: Quick meaning
ui.analysis.topology.notes.active_flow: Active Flow: connected zones with no barrier failures assumed.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.min_failure_c: Min Failure Cost: number of barrier failures needed for any path to surface.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.min_path: Min-cost Path: the path that requires the fewest failures.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.spof: SPOF: a single barrier on that best path; if it fails, a surface path exists.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.min_failure_c: If Min Failure Cost is 0, a surface path is already open in the current model.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.envelope_over: Envelope overlap means the same barrier element appears in both primary and secondary heuristic envelopes.
ui.analysis.topology.notes.volume_semant: Volume semantics: ANNULUS_A is always the first annulus; ANNULUS_B is the first casing-casing annulus when tubing is present.
ui.analysis.topology.envelope.title: Barrier envelope drill-down
ui.analysis.topology.envelope.mode.alt_p: Alternative path excluding primary path edges
No barrier elements on the primary path
Single path only (no secondary envelope found)
ui.analysis.topology.envelope.sort.label: Sort:
ui.analysis.topology.envelope.empty: No barrier elements are available for this topology run.
ui.analysis.topology.inspector.title: Node and edge inspector
ui.analysis.topology.inspector.descripti: Filter graph details by topology scope and click rows to highlight the corresponding regions.
ui.analysis.topology.inspector.nodes.emp: No topology nodes are available for the selected filters.
ui.analysis.topology.inspector.edges.emp: No topology edges are available for the selected filters.
ui.analysis.topology.path_summary.title: Selected-path summary
ui.analysis.topology.path_summary.empty: No min-cost path edge sequence is available.
ui.analysis.topology.toggle.title: Overlay layers
ui.analysis.topology.graph.title: Topology graph debug pane
ui.analysis.topology.graph.description: Fixed-lane graph view for explainability. Click a node or edge to sync selection with inspector and overlay.
ui.analysis.topology.graph.scope.label: Graph scope:
ui.analysis.topology.graph.empty_selecte: Select a barrier element row to render the selected-barrier graph scope.
ui.analysis.topology.graph.empty: No topology subgraph data is available for the selected scope.
ui.annulus_meaning.title: Annulus Meaning
ui.analysis.topology.graph.legend.termin: Green line = termination edge to surface
ui.analysis.topology.legend.title: Color legend
ui.analysis.topology.source_policy.label: Source policy:
ui.analysis.topology.source_policy.fallb: Resolved manual source overrides automatically become the authoritative source set for that run.
ui.analysis.topology.source_policy.legac: Legacy experimental illustrative-fluid mode is active for this well. Selecting a public fallback mode clears that legacy mode.
ui.analysis.topology.source_policy.volum: Volume guide: ANNULUS_A is the first annulus at that depth; ANNULUS_B..ANNULUS_F are successive annuli outward; FORMATION_ANNULUS represents the formation/open-hole annulus when applicable.
ui.analysis.topology.manual_source_overr: Use manual source overrides only when a real source is known but not represented elsewhere in the model. Resolved overrides become the authoritative source set for that analysis run.
ui.analysis.topology.overlay_sync.stale_: Topology overlays are temporarily hidden because analysis is recomputing newer results.
ui.analysis.topology.overlay_sync.geomet: Topology overlays are waiting for directional geometry to finish updating.
ui.analysis.topology.overlay_sync.reques: Topology overlays are waiting for geometry/topology request IDs to align.
ui.casing_tools.title: Casing Tools
ui.casing_tools.planner.empty: No feasible casing program matches the selected start and target.
ui.casing_tools.explorer.casing_role_hel: What holes accept this casing, and what holes can be drilled next.
ui.casing_tools.explorer.hole_role_help: What casing can be set in this hole, and what previous casing can reach it.
ui.casing_tools.explorer.empty: No rule details are available for the selected engineering size.
ui.casing_tools.table.warning.no_casing_: No catalog match for this casing OD. Manual hole size entry is still allowed.
ui.casing_tools.table.warning.custom_hol: This hole size is not in the engineering catalog. It will be kept as a custom numeric value.
ui.casing_tools.table.warning.incompatib: This catalog hole size is not listed as drillable for the current casing size.
alert.export_report_pdf_failed: 导出 PDF 报告失败
alert.project_load_path_unavailable: 原生项目打开路径不可用。在重启应用并重新打开项目之前，Ctrl+S 将使用另存为。
ui.smart_labels_enabled_hint: 自动优化首次渲染的标签可读性，同时保留手动调整能力。
ui.advanced_editor.title: 数据编辑器
ui.advanced_editor.helper: 从层级树中选择一个项目以编辑非视觉工程数据。
ui.advanced_editor.read_only.title: 只读透明数据
ui.equipment_editor.summary.title: 当前拓扑有效行为
ui.equipment_editor.summary.precedence: 优先级：设备默认值 -> 行级密封覆盖 -> 分体积覆盖 -> 执行与完整性行为。
ui.equipment_editor.help.attach_to: “Attach To”决定该设备行绑定到哪个宿主区间。
ui.equipment_editor.help.actuation_state: 在完整性未覆盖时，执行状态决定可用密封路径被指令为开启还是关闭。
ui.equipment_editor.help.integrity_statu: 完整性用于描述失效开启、失效关闭或泄漏行为，并且可以覆盖执行状态。
ui.equipment_editor.help.bore_seal: 仅当该工具需要明确影响井筒密封路径时才使用此项。
ui.equipment_editor.help.annular_seal: 仅当该工具需要明确影响环空密封路径时才使用此项。
ui.equipment_editor.help.seal_by_volume: 分体积覆盖只作用于一个命名拓扑体积，并且优先于通用密封覆盖。
ui.equipment_editor.help.packer.annular_: 封隔器在这里按环空屏障呈现。除非存在更具体的体积覆盖，否则该设置作用于解析出的宿主环空。
ui.equipment_editor.help.packer.bore_sea: 仅在专家场景下，当封隔器行还需同时影响井筒密封时才使用此项。
ui.equipment_editor.help.safety_valve.bo: 安全阀在这里按井筒屏障呈现。使用此项可明确指定井筒行为。
ui.equipment_editor.help.safety_valve.an: 对于安全阀，环空覆盖属于次要控制，仅用于高级拓扑场景。
ui.equipment_editor.help.bridge_plug.sea: 在这一阶段，桥塞按井筒聚焦屏障处理。分体积详情仍保持为只读透明数据。
ui.equipment_editor.help.generic_overrid: 更具体的分体积覆盖当前已取代此通用设置：{volumes}。
ui.equipment_editor.note.attach_resoluti: 绑定解析决定该设备会影响哪个环空槽位。
ui.equipment_editor.note.per_volume_over: 分体积覆盖正在优先于通用环空覆盖。
ui.equipment_editor.note.bridge_plug_is_: 在解析出的宿主深度处，桥塞目前按井筒聚焦屏障处理。
